judge_reason: Both descriptions correctly identify the same chart type, axes, labels, and scale, but Description B provides specific title, legend, and caption details that Description A omits without contradiction.
original_image_tags: A line graph plotting "Percent in 5-deg sector (%)" on a logarithmic y-axis (ranging from 0.1 to 100) against "Angle From Flight Path (deg)" on a linear x-axis (ranging from 0 to 180). The graph contains multiple curves representing different simulation parameters. A text overlay provides the legend and parameters.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A plotted line graph titled “Atlas IIAS Random-Attitude Failures through 280 sec,” with axes labeled “Percent in 5-deg sector (%)” and “Angle From Flight Path (deg),” multiple curves with a legend for breakup q-alpha categories (no breakup, 20,000, 10,000, 5,000) and A values (3.40, 4.30, 4.75, 5.00), captioned “Figure 11. Atlas IIAS Simulation Results with B = 100,000.”*
